mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar_url, u.bio, u.college, COALESCE(dc.post_count, 0) AS post_count, COALESCE(rc.reply_count, 0) AS reply_count, COALESCE(dc.disc_likes, 0) + COALESCE(rc.reply_likes, 0) AS received_like_count, COALESCE(dc.post_count, 0) * 3 + COALESCE(rc.reply_count, 0) * 2 + COALESCE(dc.disc_likes, 0) + COALESCE(rc.reply_likes, 0) AS activity_score FROM users u LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS post_count, SUM(COALESCE(like_count, 0)) AS disc_likes FROM discussions WHERE status = 'active' GROUP BY user_id ) dc ON u.id = dc.user_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS reply_count, SUM(COALESCE(like_count, 0)) AS reply_likes FROM replies WHERE status = 'active' GROUP BY user_id ) rc ON u.id = rc.user_id WHERE u.status = 'ACTIVE' HAVING activity_score > 0 ORDER BY activity_score DESC LIMIT #{limit}
